name: pb-chatroom
description: Self-hosted multi-Claude coordination chatroom — Python FastAPI + SQLite backend bound to 127.0.0.1, MCP tools for Claude sessions (and their subagents) to send/read threaded messages, slash commands for human-facing UX, optional graphiti archival of closed threads. All data local; no external network calls.

chatroom_url.title: pb-chatroom MCP URL
chatroom_url.description: Where to reach the pb-chatroom MCP server. Default http://localhost:7477/ works when Claude Code runs on the same host as the docker-compose stack (the common case). For Claude Code running inside a DDEV / dev container, change to http://host.docker.internal:7477/ so the container can reach the host-bound listener via Docker's host-gateway.
